narrative_beat: Wide pergaminho gigantesco com caligrafia gotica de Ap 17:12, catedral P&B

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a gigantic parchment scroll hanging from the ceiling of a Gothic cathedral, bearing the Bible verse text in large golden Gothic calligraphy, illuminated by a vertical beam of divine light
subject.focal_point: the golden calligraphic text on the parchment center
subject.secondary: Cathedral ribbed vaulting in monochrome above. Stone floor below.

environment.location: inside a massive Gothic cathedral nave
environment.time_of_day: divine light beam from above, cathedral interior otherwise dim
environment.atmosphere: sacred revelation, the Word of God displayed in grandeur

composition.foreground: parchment with golden text in vivid warm tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white cathedral ribbed vaulting and columns

lighting.key_light: vertical divine golden light beam from above illuminating the scroll

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: sacred grandeur, the Word displayed in its full authority

symbolism.primary: Revelation 17:12 — ten horns are ten kings who receive power with the Beast
symbolism.secondary: cathedral as scale befitting the Word of God

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.content: E os dez chifres que viste sao dez reis, que ainda nao receberam o reino
in_scene_text.font_style: ancient gothic calligraphy in gold leaf, large scale
in_scene_text.medium: inscribed on gigantic hanging parchment scroll in cathedral
in_scene_text.placement: center of frame on the scroll
in_scene_text.legibility: crisp and readable at large scale

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

api_call_hints.critical_note_for_gemini: The text in quotes MUST be rendered exactly as written, letter by letter, in the specified font style. This is a Bible verse and accuracy is sacred.
